name: Echo Memory Cloud OpenClaw Plugin
description: Sync OpenClaw local markdown memory files to Echo cloud

baseUrl.description: Deprecated and ignored. The plugin now uses a fixed internal EchoMem backend endpoint.

webBaseUrl.description: Deprecated and ignored. The plugin now uses a fixed internal Echo web endpoint.

apiKey.description: Your API Key for Echo Memory Cloud (e.g. from .env ECHOMEM_API_KEY)

memoryDir.description: Absolute path to the markdown memory directory. Falls back to ECHOMEM_MEMORY_DIR, then ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory.
